class.name: IcyAudioDecoder
class.brief_description: Generic audio decoder class providing a common interface for audio stream decoders with buffering support.
class.description:
[IcyAudioDecoder] is a generic audio decoder base class that provides a common interface for audio stream decoders. It manages interaction with an [AudioStreamGeneratorPlayback] instance and provides a standardized buffering mechanism, including configurable buffer thresholds, buffering state tracking, and notifications when buffering starts or finishes.
[b]Note:[/b] Derived classes are expected to implement the actual decoding logic.

signal.name: buffering_started
signal.description: Emitted when the buffered audio data has been depleted and the decoder enters the buffering state.

signal.name: buffering_finished
signal.description: Emitted when the buffered audio data reaches the configured target threshold and buffering completes.

method.name: set_playback
method.description: Sets the [AudioStreamGeneratorPlayback] instance used by the decoder for buffer management. This playback object is used to determine the current buffering state and available audio frames.

method.name: set_buffer_thresholds
method.description: Configures the buffering thresholds used by the decoder. [code]target_frames[/code] specifies the number of buffered frames required before buffering is considered complete, while [code]max_capacity_frames[/code] specifies the maximum expected buffer capacity.

method.name: process_audio
method.description: Processes decoder-specific audio handling and moves raw audio frame data into the [AudioStreamGeneratorPlayback]'s ring buffer. [b]Note:[/b] This method is intended to be implemented by derived decoder classes.

method.name: get_buffering_progress
method.description: Returns the current buffering progress as a value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code].

method.name: is_buffering
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the decoder is currently buffering audio data, otherwise returns [code]false[/code].

method.name: get_current_target_frames
method.description: Returns the current target number of buffered frames required before playback can resume after buffering.

method.name: get_current_max_capacity_frames
method.description: Returns the configured maximum buffer capacity, expressed in audio frames.
